## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Safety

- [ ] No private notes, Tailnet hostnames, device serials, tokens, or local user
      paths are included.
- [ ] Screenshots use a demo notes folder.
- [ ] Upstream Scratch attribution is preserved where relevant.
